name: Peach Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, peaches, and 1/3 cup sugar in a buttered shallow 1-1/2-quart baking dish.
2. Mix flour, remaining 1/3 cup sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. Cut in butter until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Sprinkle over rice.
5. Sprinkle nuts over flour mixture.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
Frozen unsweetened peach slices or 1 can (6 ounces) sliced peaches in fruit juice, drained, may be substituted.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
Prepare as directed using microwave-proof baking dish. Cook uncovered on HIGH (maximum power) for 5 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish once during cooking time. Let stand 5 minutes.
